prompt_text: Compare Helicone and LangSmith for monitor LLM requests costs and latency in real time across all providers
response:
# Helicone vs LangSmith: LLM Monitoring Comparison

## Overview Comparison

| Feature | Helicone | LangSmith |
|---------|----------|-----------|
| **Primary Focus** | Cost & Latency Monitoring | LLM Development & Evaluation |
| **Real-time Monitoring** | ‚úÖ Excellent | ‚úÖ Good |
| **Multi-provider Support** | ‚úÖ 15+ providers | ‚úÖ Via LangChain |
| **Cost Tracking** | ‚úÖ Native & detailed | ‚öÝÔ∏è Secondary feature |
| **Ease of Integration** | ‚úÖ Very simple | ‚öÝÔ∏è LangChain dependent |

---

## Cost Monitoring

### Helicone
```python
# Simple drop-in proxy setup
import anthropic

client = anthropic.Anthropic(
    api_key="your-api-key",
    base_url="https://api.helicone.ai/anthropic/v1"
)

# Automatically tracks costs per request
response = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-3-opus-20240229",
    max_tokens=1024,
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello!"}]
)
```

**Strengths:**
- Real-time cost breakdown per request
- Cross-provider cost comparison
- Budget alerts & spending trends
- Token counting accuracy
- Cost per user/feature tracking

### LangSmith
```python
from langchain_anthropic import ChatAnthropic
from langsmith import traceable

@traceable(run_type="llm")
def call_llm():
    llm = ChatAnthropic(model="claude-3-opus-20240229")
    return llm.invoke("Hello!")

# Cost data available in dashboard (basic)
```

**Strengths:**
- Integrated with LangChain ecosystem
- Cost visible in traces
- Less detailed cost analytics

---

## Latency Monitoring

### Helicone
```python
# Automatic latency capture
{
  "request_id": "123abc",
  "latency_ms": 1247,
  "time_to_first_token": 380,
  "provider": "openai",
  "model": "gpt-4"
}
```

**Strengths:**
- Per-request latency metrics
- Time-to-first-token tracking
- Latency trends by model/provider
- P50, P95, P99 percentiles
- Provider comparison dashboards

### LangSmith
```python
# Latency visible in trace details
{
  "run_id": "xyz789",
  "duration": 1.247,
  "status": "success"
}
```

**Strengths:**
- Latency in context of full trace
- Execution timeline visualization
- Less specialized latency analytics

---

## Provider Support

### Helicone (Direct Integration)
```
‚úÖ OpenAI (GPT-4, GPT-3.5)
‚úÖ Anthropic (Claude family)
‚úÖ Azure OpenAI
‚úÖ Cohere
‚úÖ Together AI
‚úÖ Replicate
‚úÖ Baseten
‚úÖ Custom models
```

### LangSmith (Via LangChain)
```
‚úÖ All LangChain integrations
‚úÖ OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Cohere
‚öÝÔ∏è Limited to LangChain ecosystem
```

---
